response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, aligning partially with the GenAI/cloud focus. However, his resume lacks explicit depth in production-grade AI/ML systems, RAG architectures, or vector databases, and his recent roles emphasize general software development over AI-specific leadership.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in full-stack development with TypeScript and Node.js, relevant to cloud-based AI system integration.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing familiarity with emerging GenAI frameworks.
Proven leadership in technical discovery, mentorship, and cross-functional collaboration across diverse engineering roles.
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions or designing RAG architectures/vector databases.
Recent roles (e.g., Optilyz) focus on pricing optimization and direct mail automation, not AI/ML systems.
No mention of advanced degrees (e.g., Master's/PhD) or deep expertise in LLM performance metrics/optimization techniques.
